title: Rawkto Rawhoshyo
overview: Swarnaja (Koel Mallick) is a hard-working do-gooder radio jockey with the rarest blood group in the world, Rh null blood group. She has been brought up by her grandmother. Her four year old son Pawrag is kidnapped by Shammo, an imposter.
